steps.t: The dwarf-holding lies to the east of Rammas Deluon and south of Duvuinen. Búdan spoke to you of a hidden holding of the dwarves in Angmar and suggest…
The leader of the dwarves is at Gabilshathûr. You have discovered hidden holding of the dwarves in Angmar, Gabilshathûr. You should seek out and speak…
